sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بَعْضُ الشَّبَابِ كَصُنَّاعِ مُحْتَوًى عَلَى الْيُوتِيُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Neki mladi ljudi rade kao kreatori sadržaja na YouTubeu.
sentences.translationEn: Some young people work as content creators on YouTube.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُونَ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو تَعْلِيمِيَّةً أَوْ تَرْفِيهِيَّةً لِلْمُتَابِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Oni pružaju edukativne ili zabavne video snimke za pratioce.
sentences.translationEn: They provide educational or entertaining video clips for followers.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ هَذَا الْعَمَلُ إِلَى الْإِبْدَاعِ وَالِاسْتِمْرَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj posao zahtijeva kreativnost i kontinuitet.
sentences.translationEn: This work requires creativity and consistency.
